purpose: Activity Log entry — 2026-05-14 GI provider intros to Specialty Pharmacy program

text.content: Dr Parmar (GI Medical Services) + Dr Langan (GI) — Specialty Pharmacy program intros

Both Dr Parmar (GI Medical Services) and Dr Langan introduced to Specialty Pharmacy program in same AM session. Both bought in. Immediate actionable for both offices is identical: Ilene receives the CDTM form, orders start flowing direct to Insight Outpatient Pharmacy. Notion pages for both providers carry full context (see Provider CRM).

(1) Ilene to receive CDTM forms from Parmar + Langan offices, week of 5/19. (2) Win over PA/office staff at both offices (real sellers given ~40% PA acceptance rate on expensive biologics). (3) Pitch their PA team as well — better PA quality = lower lab expense for us. (4) Tag both providers in Provider CRM as SP-active pipeline.
